name: CurrentFlow
summary: The CurrentFlow collector gathers real-time data on the network flow from managed devices.

fields.name: local_ip
fields.description: IP address of the source of the packet. Supports CIDR block notation.

fields.name: remote_ip
fields.description: IP address of the destination of the packet. Supports CIDR block notation.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The status of the TCP transaction (not available in UDP transactions).

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user that owns the originating process.

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: The user ID of the process owning the socket.

fields.name: proto
fields.description: The packet's protocol: TCP or UDP.

fields.name: md5
fields.description: The MD5 hash code for the source process.

fields.name: sha1
fields.description: The SHA-1 hash code for the source process.

fields.name: sha256
fields.description: The SHA-256 hash code for the source process.

examples.title: Example: Show process image names for current flow originating on CIDR block 10.250.45.0/24 and targeting endpoint 10.0.0.2.
examples.v2_query: CurrentFlow process_id where CurrentFlow local_ip contains 10.250.45.0/24 and CurrentFlow remote_ip equals 10.0.0.2
